dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I'm GOING OUT FOR A BIT!

dialogue.speaker: Mom
dialogue.line: HEY, WHERE DO YOU THINK YOU'RE GOING AT THIS HOUR?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: STARTED WITH BB CREAM, LIP TINT AND EYELINER.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THEN, EYELINER... AM I DOING THIS RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WOW, THIS LIP TINT HAS A NICE COLOR! ALL DONE!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WAIT; IT JUST FEELS LIKE SOMETHING IS MISSING. STILL, SOMEHOW IT SEEMS BETTER THAN BEFORE.

dialogue.speaker: Sister
dialogue.line: Sis! Mom asked me to bring you th-

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: EVER HEARD OF KNOCKING, YOU LUNATIC?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HEY, WHAT DO YOU THINK? DO I LOOK OKAY?

dialogue.speaker: Sister
dialogue.line: THAT HURT MY EYES! AAAHHH! MY EYES! OH, HEART, THAT'S ENOUGH TO BLIND A MAN AT FIRST SIGHT!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DOES IT LOOK THAT WEIRD? BUT THE MORE I SEE MYSELF, THE BETTER IT LOOKS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THIS IS SO AWKWARD. IS EVERYONE STARING AT ME? THIS MUST BE HOW PRETTY GIRLS FEEL EVERY DAY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT IS IT? DO I LOOK A BIT DIFFERENT TODAY?

dialogue.speaker: Student
dialogue.line: HOLY CRAP, LOOK AT HER. HAHAHAHA.

dialogue.speaker: Student
dialogue.line: HEY, IS SHE GOING FOR AN OLD MAKEUP LOOK? HAHA. SHE LOOKS LIKE SHE USED A BLACK MARKER TO DRAW ON HER EYE. JUST WAIT TILL THE DEAN CATCHES HER, HAHA. CAN'T STOP LAUGHING. HAHAHAHAHA.

dialogue.speaker: Student
dialogue.line: UGLY CHICKS ALWAYS STAND OUT NO MATTER WHAT~ HAHA.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: A GIRL LIKE ME IS UGLY EVEN WITH MAKEUP!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: OPEN FORUM (TEMPORARY POST) DOES MY MAKEUP LOOK REALLY WEIRD? BB + EYELINER + LIP TINT. DOES IT LOOK WEIRD? I NEED SOME OBJECTIVE FEEDBACK :(

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: COMMENT 26 (TEMPORARY POST) DOES MY MAKEUP LOOK REALLY WEIRD? BE THE FIRST TO 'LIKE' THIS POST BY ORDER OF UPLOAD MOST RECENT NEW COMMENT NOTIFICATIONS

dialogue.speaker: PRETTY_PRETTY
dialogue.line: OH MY GOD, NO WAY. PLEASE. DON'T TELL ME YOU WENT OUT LOOKING LIKE THAT! DID YOU DRAW WITH A BLACK MARKER?

dialogue.speaker: CHICKEN_MANIAC
dialogue.line: YOU SHOULD START BY FIXING YOUR EYEBROWS. THEY LOOK LIKE CATERPILLARS. I USED AN APP TO CLEAN UP YOUR EYEBROWS. I WOULD START BY FIXING THEM FIRST ASAP.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH GOD, SHE'S RIGHT. I HAD BETTER TRIM MY EYEBROWS. CATERPILLARS.

dialogue.speaker: PLAY_WITH_FIRE
dialogue.line: HEY, READ THE THIRD 'BEST POST'. I THINK IT WILL HELP YOU OUT.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: BEFORE AND AFTER USING DOUBLE EYELID GLUE

dialogue.speaker: WANNABE IRING
dialogue.line: HEY, GIRLS! I'D LIKE TO GIVE YOU SOME MAKEUP TIPS AND SECRETS FOR USING DOUBLE EYELID GLUE ^0^

dialogue.speaker: WANNABE IRING
dialogue.line: HEY, GIRLS! I'D LIKE TO GIVE YOU SOME MAKEUP TIPS AND SECRETS FOR USING DOUBLE EYELID GLUE. THIS IS HOW MY EYES USUALLY LOOK. AND THIS IS HOW THEY LOOK WITH DOUBLE EYELID GLUE + LENSES! AMAZING, RIGHT?!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: SINCE SOME PEOPLE HAVE ASKED FOR INFO ABOUT THE LENSES, THEY'RE BROWN 'PARADISE KISS' LENSES MADE BY XX MEDICAL.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: GASP! WOW, HOW IS THAT EVEN POSSIBLE?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE DAY HAS FINALLY COME TO OPEN YOU. SORRY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: MOM! I'm GOING OUT FOR A BIT!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THE RESULTS OF MY EXPEDITION WERE TREMENDOUS.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: NOW! FIRST, LET ME START BY WORKING ON MY EYEBROWS!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: UHOOO, DID I TRIM THEM TOO MUCH?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: TRY TO STAY CALM. IT'S OKAY! I CAN JUST DRAW IT ON. COME, SAVE ME, SPIRIT OF CALMNESS.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: TRIMMED MY EYEBROWS. NOW IT'S TIME FOR DOUBLE EYELID GLUE!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: UGH, THIS ISN'T RIGHT EITHER! AGAIN!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HEY! THAT LOOKS PRETTY GOOD! MAN, DOUBLE EYELID GLUE IS HARD TO USE.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OH MY GOD. I CAN'T BELIEVE THIS!

summary: The protagonist's first attempt at makeup with BB cream, lip tint, and eyeliner results in a disastrous look that draws ridicule from her sister and classmates. Humiliated, she seeks advice online, discovers tips for double eyelid glue and contact lenses, and embarks on a new, expensive, and diligent journey to master makeup.
